title: Multiplayer Essentials
description: Just a few QOL mods to help improve your multiplayer (or singleplayer) experience.
body:
# Multiplayer Essentials

Just a few QOL mods to help improve your multiplayer (or singleplayer) experience.

# Mods
| Mod |  Desciption  | Link |
|:-----|:--------:|------:|
| Journeymap   | Minimap mod that allows you to view previous areas you've explored on a map | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/journeymap) |
| 3D Skin Layers   | Renders skin layers in 3D | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers) |
| AppleSkin   | Improves the hunger HUD | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) |
| Capes   | Allows you to see people's capes from multiple cape mods | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes) |
| WaveyCapes   | Makes people's capes look better by making them wavey | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/wavey-capes) |
| Continuity   | Connected textures | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) |
| Controlify   | Allows you to play using a controller | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlify) |
| Gamma Shifter   | Allows you to customize your gamma | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamma-shifter) |
| Just Enough Items   | Allows you to search for items to see how to make them | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) |
| Map Tooltip   | Allows you to preview maps in your inventory | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/map-tooltip) |
| Tooltip Scroll   | Allows you to scroll through item tooltips if they're too big | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/tooltip-scroll) |
| Essential   | Many QOL features (such as inviting friends to singleplayer worlds) | [Website](https://essential.gg/) |
| No Chat Reports   | Attempts to remove chat signatures so they can't be reported | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports) |
| Mod Menu   | Allows you to view what mods you're using and config them to your liking | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) |
| Blur   | Blurs the background in menus | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/blur-fabric) |
| Iris   | Allows you to use shaders | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) |
| BetterF3   | Improves the F3 HUD | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3) |
| Ugly Scoreboard Fix | Removes scores from scoreboards to make them look cleaner | [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ugly-scoreboard-fix) |
| Sodium   | Optimization mod | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) |
| Sodium Extra   | Adds extra fetures to Sodium | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) |
| Reese's Sodium Options   | Changes how Sodium's options menu looks | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) |
| Lithium   | Optimization mod  | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) |
| LazyDFU   | Helps speed up Minecraft's launch times | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu) |
| FerriteCore   | Reduces memory usage | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) |
| Dynamic FPS   | Lowers your FPS when Minecraft is minimized to save resources | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) |
| MixinTrace   | Adds a list of mixins to classes in crash logs | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/mixintrace) |
| YOSBR   | Keeps your settings if you update the modpack | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/yosbr) |
| YetAnotherConfigLib   | Required by other mods in this modpack | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) |
| Indium   | Required by other mods in this modpack | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) |
| Fabric Language Kotlin   | Required by other mods in this modpack | [Curseforge](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-language-kotlin) |
| Fabric API   | Required by other mods in this modpack | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/) |
